# Southern Pine Depot

> Factory Direct Southern Yellow Pine. Milled in Mississippi. Stocked in Mt Juliet.

## Resources

- [Southern Pine Depot Homepage](https://southernpinedepot.com/)
- [Request a Quote](https://southernpinedepot.com/#quote-section)
- [Inventory & Patterns](https://southernpinedepot.com/#patterns)
- [Grading & Standards](https://southernpinedepot.com/#grading)
- [FAQ](https://southernpinedepot.com/#faq)

## About Southern Pine Depot
Southern Pine Depot provides premium factory direct Southern Yellow Pine lumber, milled in Mississippi and stocked in Mt Juliet, TN. We specialize in center-matched tongue and groove flooring, beaded ceiling, nickel gap shiplap, and V-groove patterns across various aesthetic grades.

By selling mill-direct, we eliminate broker, wholesaler, and retailer markups, offering significant cost savings (e.g. $0.79/LF vs $1.08/LF in box stores).

## Stock Patterns
All patterns are precision milled to a 5 1/8" face width and feature tongue & groove joinery for easy blind-nail installation:

- **Nickel Gap Shiplap**: Modern design with a clean 1/8" gap between boards for sharp, consistent shadow lines. Great for walls and ceilings.
- **V-Groove (116/122)**: Reversible tongue and groove pattern featuring a center V on one side and a V-groove on the other.
- **Flooring**: Durable, center-matched tongue and groove flooring that creates a smooth, seamless surface ready for sanding and finishing.
- **Beaded Ceiling (Beadboard)**: Classic Southern beadboard featuring a decorative bead down the center and edge, ideal for porch ceilings and wainscoting.

## Aesthetic Grades
We offer two aesthetic grades with identical structural integrity:

- **Premium Knotty**: Characterized by sound, tight knots and rich grain variations. Offers authentic, rustic warmth ideal for farmhouses, cabins, and accent walls.
- **Clear Grade (C & Better)**: Virtually knot-free (99% knot-free) with long, clean grain lines. Best for modern, contemporary looks, staining, whitewashing, pickling, or painted finishes.

## Logistics & Delivery
- **Nationwide Shipping**: Shipping is available nationwide, with competitive freight rates to the Southeast and Midwest. Typical LTL transit times are 2-4 days.
- **Same Day Delivery**: Available for in-stock orders placed before 10 AM within a 100-mile radius of Nashville, TN.
- **Will-Call Pickups**: Customers can schedule pickups at the Mt Juliet warehouse. Will-call is by appointment only, scheduled at least 24 hours in advance.
- **Unloading**: Forklift is recommended for large orders (2+ bundles). For residential deliveries, a Lift Gate service can be arranged.

## Contact Information
- **Warehouse Address**: 245 Couchville Industrial Blvd, Mount Juliet, TN 37122
- **Phone**: 601-927-6692
